text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's like a breath of fresh air to be somewhere
new! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
First things first, it's time for a dip! I'm an amazing
swimmer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Relax! You'll be there with me anyways!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make the most out of this camp, but it's
your job to make sure I don't wear myself out!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get this training started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so summer camp with Tokai Teio begins.
